non_blocking_notes: `npm test` and `npm run build` could not run in this read-only sandbox because Vitest/Astro attempted writes under `node_modules/.vite-temp` and `.astro/content.d.ts`.
Secret scan found no committed secrets in the diff; `.env.example` adds variable names/placeholders only.
Diff-added lines contain no em dash/en dash, and the added admin/member data UI does not use gold accents.

spec_compliance.evidence: `requireSuperAdmin` resolves through the `members` table, deny-by-default allowlist, and gates admin queries/mutations/actions; UI `amISuperAdmin` is only a courtesy boolean.

Queue returns masked rows with server-side opaque duplicate grouping; one-row email reveal is audited; resolution checks member/email collisions, refuses unsafe duplicate states, archives only the true pair case, and preserves normal `matchClaim`.
Panel uses authenticated admin as reviewer and shared `applyPipelineDecision`, which requires standard lane, active lifecycle, and latest true pipeline consent before approval.
Admin surface exposes resend only, reuses the guardian send path and throttles, records admin audit rows, and has no path that sets `confirmation_state = confirmed`.

Visitor submission is Turnstile-gated and inert; signed-in member submission uses session email only; admin approval/rejection is gated and audited. `fulfilExport`/`executeErasure` are absent per the 2026-07-04 deferral.
All admin queue writes and per-row contact reveal use `ConfirmAction` with an explicit second click and inline result state.
`listAdminAuditLog` paginates `source = "admin_fallback"` directly through `by_source_time` and returns read-only panel action rows.
No bulk data export or general member search was added; queues are scoped to review-state rows, and public data-request submission does not reveal subject existence.

Unit, Convex integration, and E2E coverage were added for admin auth, queues, claim resolution, pipeline guards, guardian resend, data requests, audit visibility, and `/admin` discovery guards; execution was blocked by sandbox writes.
No Contributor, Safeguarding Deputy, certificate admin, event admin, broadcast UI, general member directory/search, or config editor was added.

summary: Current diff satisfies the admin-panel acceptance criteria I could verify from code and vault sources. I found no ship-blocking authorization, under-18 safeguarding, data leakage, input-validation, audit-trail, or spec-delivery gap.
